meta.tip1: For security/deposits - You do not classify as Acct.Rev, ie.  `own` the money until a tenant moves out and forfeits it for damages. Putting it in an income account will artificially inflate your tax bill.

Acct.Cash.Security.acctDesc: Security Deposit Trust Account (Funds held for tenants; must be kept separate)

Acct.Cash.Escrow.acctDesc: Escrow / Earnest Money Holding (Funds paid to title company before closing; cleared at settlement)

Acct.Fixed.Tangible.InConstruction.acctDesc: Asset: Debit Buildings Not InService - purchase prices + construction Expenses

Acct.Fixed.Tangible.acctDesc: Buildings (The purchase price of the physical structure)

Acct.Fixed.Depreciation.Accum.acctDesc: Accumulated Depreciation (A "contra-asset" account tracking the building's value loss over time)

Acct.Fixed.Tangible.Improvements.acctDesc: Buildings, Improvements (Major: new flooring, central A/C, complete remodels)

Acct.Liab.Customer.Security.acctDesc: Tenant Security Deposits Held (This offsets the cash in your trust account)

Acct.Liab.Customer.Rent.Prepai.acctDesc: Prepaid Rent (Rent paid by tenants before it is due, first, last)

Acct.Liab.Morgage.acctDesc: Mortgage Payable - long term 25xx-26xx (The principal balance on your property loan)

Acct.Equity.Owner.Capital.Funds.acctDesc: Owner Contribution, Personal funds, taxable, increase Outside Basis)

Acct.Equity.Owner.Capital.Dist.acctDesc: Owner Distribution, K1 Income, no change to outside basis.

Acct.Equity.Owner.Capital.Reinvestment.acctDesc: Owner Contribution, tax-paid; increase Outside Basis

Acct.Equity.Earnings.PnL.acctDesc: Retained Earnings (Cumulative profit or loss from previous years)

Acct.Rev.Ord.Services.acctDesc: ACTIVE (40xx), Non-Rental Ops, Service Revenue: General fees for services provided.

Acct.Rev.Ord.Sales.acctDesc: Ord: Income from merchandise, hats, t-shirts, or branded gear.

Acct.Rev.Ord.Commission.acctDesc: Ord: Referral fees (e.g., if you get a kickback for booking a fishing charter for a guest)

Acct.Rev.Ord.Other.acctDesc: Ord: Other Ordinary: Small, miscellaneous active income..

Acct.Rev.Rent.acctDesc: PASSIVE (43xx), Rental Operations, Real Estate Rental Income

Acct.Rev.Util.acctDesc: Utility Reimbursement (If tenants pay you back for shared utilities)

Acct.Exp.Fees.Mgmt.acctDesc: Management Fees (If using a third-party manager)

Acct.Exp.Int.Morg.acctDesc: Mortgage Interest (Interest only; principal goes to Liability 2100)

Acct.Recurring.Exp.acctDesc: Recurring/Scheduled Expense — staging account; acctSub encodes target posting accounts (e.g. YE:Acct.Exp.Depreciation-Acct.Fixed.Depreciation.Accum)

Acct.Recurring.Rev.acctDesc: Recurring/Scheduled Revenue — staging account; acctSub encodes target posting accounts

Acct.Unrealized.Appreciation.acctDesc: Sale of Asset, Gain/Loss: if you sell a company vehicle or equipment.

nmDict.title: COA Names Chart
nmDict.Desc: FIXME: Under Construction - map acct ID to Financial Report name
